STR: +10 DEX: +10 INT: +10
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: EAR
STR: +10 DEX: +10 INT: +10
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: SMALL

Stackable:No

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live

Page Updated:Sun Jan 30th, 2022

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Given | Quests | Comments ]

Obtained From

This item is obtained from NPCs.

Paineel
NPC Name Expansion
Gerot Kastane Ruins of Kunark

Quests

This item is used in quests.

The Overthere
Quest Name

# Aug 24 2005 at 6:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592346300023
6 posts
where do i get the head of valiant, what zone does it drop in and what drops it
▲ Page top
IC
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2004 at 8:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757397175
217 posts
I found this BP simply didn't stay with me that long, as there are better ones out there that are a tad easier to get, like an LDON BP. But this was still a very keepsake. Plus, with the new epics coming out, it is worth getting.
▲ Page top
Quest in and off it's self
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2003 at 2:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791444426
5 posts
I think it needs to be bluntly pointed out that this is not so much of a drop but a mini quest or step within a quest. You don't simply find the earring on a corpse, you actually loot "Head of Glohnor" and turn that in. Which requires the step directly before that in the epic quest in order for the Mummy of Glohnor to spawn.

▲ Page top
good item
QuoteReply
# May 22 2002 at 3:24 AM Rating: Good
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
this one, like the bp Will of Innoruuk are nice.
Just do the steps in the hole 2 times, leaving one copy on a body to come back and loot later.

Dark Elf Shadow Knight
Drinal (Tarew)

▲ Page top
Take two.
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 12:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245841926
View User Forum
Scholar
44 posts
I think if I ran a Shadowknight, I'd want two of these. One to get Epic, then another to wear.
But that is only my opinion.

Cya in Norrath.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 09 2001 at 3:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Unfortunately, once you complete the quest for Innoruk's Curse, your faction with the NPCs that start the quest is perminantly shot. So you can only do it once. Plus this item comes a fair bit down the line in the quest, and it's just not worth doing the whole thing twice anyway.
RE: Take two.
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2002 at 4:03 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751738458
87 posts
I think it depends on HOW you do the IC quest. People who do the book part over and over again ruin their truespirt faction, if I recall correctly from the SK boards.
▲ Page top
RE: Take two.
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 11:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763937007
6 posts
You are incorrect sir. Your True Spirit faction remains the same once you have completed the quest. As well, you do not need to do the first part once again, as you allready have the faction required. You just need to get another Cell Key and kill Kyrenna and the Mummy of Glohnor again. Both of those steps are quite easy as well. Perhaps you should do a little research next time you shoot down someones idea. ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Take two.
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 8:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780592889
6 posts
No, your TS faction changes when you get Innoruuk's Curse. Some swear you become KoS, however I was apprehensive when took the faction hit and when beginning the quest steps to get the Will of Innoruuk and the Head of Valiant again, I was still apprehensive.

During the quest for IC, I ran 20 notes from Marl to Gerot. This enabled me to skip the evil Ratman Guard step in Hole. I am guessing that this helped me stay apprehensive. HOWEVER, upon trying to start the quest over again, I still wasn't a high enough level of apprehensive to get the proper response from Gerot that lets you know your faction is high enough to begin the quest for the Will of Innoruuk and the Head of the Valiant: "Oh xxxxxx, you are my hero..."

All I did was do part of the shaman epic to fix my faction. 5 times I carried the gem from the Lesser Spirit in BB (see shaman quest) to the shaman in the North Freeport tunnels. I had a friend invis me after I opened the trade window and all went well. After 5 times, Gerot was telling me that I was his hero which meant I had the faction needed to do the quest again.

Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
RE: Take two.
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2004 at 5:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374934311
81 posts
Just wondering how could you get the Shaman gem if you're apprehensive?

RE: Take two.

What are you talking about? It's awesome. STR, DEX, INT, MR, everything a PKing SK needs
